languages.text: "Ваши слова — воля Бога-Императора, Ваша Светлость. Я передам их войскам. Во имя Его и во славу династии мы претерпим".
"Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."
languages.original_text: "Ваши слова — воля Бога-Императора, Ваша Светлость. Я передам их войскам. Во имя Его и во славу династии мы претерпим".

traits.locale_text: "Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll see it delivered to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."
"Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."
"All this suffering is the God-Emperor's design? I... I don't know what to say. Was Izdrig right? Was I naive in my hopes?"
"Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll see it delivered to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."
"Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."

languages.text: 「この苦しみは全て、神皇帝の設計なのか？…私は何を言ったらいいのかわからない。イズドリックは正しいのか？私の希望は甘すぎたのか？」
languages.original_text: "All this suffering is the God-Emperor's design? I... I don't know what to say. Was Izdrig right? Was I naive in my hopes?"

languages.text: "Sözleriniz Tanrı İmparator'un iradesidir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bunları birliklere ileteceğim. O'nun adına ve hanedanlığın şanı için dayanacağız."
languages.original_text: "Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."

traits.locale_text: "Sözleriniz Tanrı İmparator'un iradesidir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bunları birliklere ileteceğim. O'nun adına ve hanedanlığın şanı için dayanacağız."

languages.text: “您的话语即是神皇的意志，大人。我会转达给士兵们。以祂之名，为了王朝的荣耀，我们将忍耐到底。”
languages.original_text: "Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."

traits.locale_text: “您的话语即是神皇的意志，大人。我会转达给士兵们。以祂之名，为了王朝的荣耀，我们将忍耐到底。”

languages.text: "Eure Worte sind der Wille des Gottimperators, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich habe sie an die Truppen weitergeleitet. In Seinem Namen und für den Ruhm der Dynastie werden wir durchhalten."
languages.original_text: "Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Worte sind der Wille des Gottimperators, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich habe sie an die Truppen weitergeleitet. In Seinem Namen und für den Ruhm der Dynastie werden wir durchhalten."

languages.text: « Votre volonté est celle de l'Empereur-Dieu, Votre Seigneurie. J'en ferai part aux troupes. Pour la gloire de l'Empereur-Dieu et de la dynastie, nous ne nous y opposerons pas. »
languages.original_text: "Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."

traits.locale_text: « Votre volonté est celle de l'Empereur-Dieu, Votre Seigneurie. J'en ferai part aux troupes. Pour la gloire de l'Empereur-Dieu et de la dynastie, nous ne nous y opposerons pas. »

languages.text: «Sus palabras son la voluntad del Dios Emperador, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Se las transmitiré a las tropas. En Su nombre y por la gloria de la dinastía, lo soportaremos».
languages.original_text: "Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."

traits.locale_text: «Sus palabras son la voluntad del Dios Emperador, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Se las transmitiré a las tropas. En Su nombre y por la gloria de la dinastía, lo soportaremos».
